officiates over the [Rotorua Lakes District](/wiki/Rotorua_Lakes_District "Rotorua Lakes District") of New Zealand, which is administered by the [Rotorua Lakes Council](/wiki/Rotorua_Lakes_Council "Rotorua Lakes Council"). An elected borough council first came together in February 1923; prior to that, the area had effectively been under government control.[[1]](#cite_note-1) Rotorua has had 15 mayors as of 2022, and the current mayor is [Tania Tapsell](/wiki/Tania_Tapsell "Tania Tapsell").[[2]](#cite_note-2)

["About Rotorua's History"](http://www.rotorualibrary.govt.nz/heritage/history/Pages/About-Rotorua%27s-History.aspx). Rotorua District Library. Retrieved 26 October 2012.[*[permanent dead link](/wiki/Wikipedia:Link_rot "Wikipedia:Link rot")*]
["Tania Tapsell elected mayor of Rotorua"](https://thespinoff.co.nz/live-updates/08-10-2022/tania-tapsell-elected-mayor-of-rotorua). *The Spinoff*. 8 October 2022.
["The Rotary Club of Rotorua West – Chartered August 19th, 1965"](http://www.rotaryrotoruawest.org/west_history.htm). The Rotary Club of Rotorua West. Retrieved 26 October 2012.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

| Mayor of Rotorua | |
| --- | --- |
| Coat of arms of Rotorua | |
| Incumbent [Tania Tapsell](/wiki/Tania_Tapsell "Tania Tapsell") since 21 October 2022 | |
| [Style](/wiki/Style_(form_of_address) "Style (form of address)") | Mayor |
| Appointer | Elected |
| Formation | 1923 |
| Salary | $159,679 |
| Website | <https://rotorualakescouncil.nz> |

The **mayor of Rotorua** officiates over the [Rotorua Lakes District](/wiki/Rotorua_Lakes_District "Rotorua Lakes District") of New Zealand, which is administered by the [Rotorua Lakes Council](/wiki/Rotorua_Lakes_Council "Rotorua Lakes Council"). An elected borough council first came together in February 1923; prior to that, the area had effectively been under government control.[[1]](#cite_note-1) Rotorua has had 15 mayors as of 2022, and the current mayor is [Tania Tapsell](/wiki/Tania_Tapsell "Tania Tapsell").[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## List of office holders

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mayor_of_Rotorua&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: List of office holders")]

|  | Name | Portrait | Term |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | [Cecil Clinkard](/wiki/Cecil_Clinkard "Cecil Clinkard") |  | 1923–1927 |
| 2 | Thomas McDowell |  | 1927–1928 |
| 3 | John N. McLean |  | 1928–1929 |
| 4 | Thomas Jackson |  | 1929–1941 |
| 5 | Harry D. Dansey |  | 1941–1942 |
| 6 | Prentice A. Kusabs |  | 1942–1947 |
| 7 | [Alexander Moncur](/wiki/Alexander_Moncur "Alexander Moncur") |  | 1947–1953 |
| 8 | [Murray Linton](/wiki/Murray_Linton "Murray Linton")[[3]](#cite_note-3) |  | 1953–1971 |
| 9 | [Ray Boord](/wiki/Ray_Boord "Ray Boord") |  | 1971–1977 |
| 10 | Ray Woolliams[[4]](#cite_note-4) |  | 1977–1979 |
| 11 | John Keaney[[5]](#cite_note-5) |  | 1979–1993 |
| 12 | Grahame Hall[[6]](#cite_note-6) |  | 1993–2004 |
| 13 | Kevin Winters[[7]](#cite_note-7) |  | 2004–2013 |
| 14 | [Steve Chadwick](/wiki/Steve_Chadwick "Steve Chadwick")[[8]](#cite_note-2013_election-8) |  | 2013–2022 |
| 15 | [Tania Tapsell](/wiki/Tania_Tapsell "Tania Tapsell") |  | 2022–present |

### Members of Parliament

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mayor_of_Rotorua&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Members of Parliament")]

Four mayors have also been Members of Parliament, and all of them represented the [Rotorua electorate](/wiki/Rotorua_(New_Zealand_electorate) "Rotorua (New Zealand electorate)") (the years in brackets give their term in Parliament):

* [Cecil Clinkard](/wiki/Cecil_Clinkard "Cecil Clinkard") (1928–1935)
* [Alexander Moncur](/wiki/Alexander_Moncur "Alexander Moncur") (1935–1943)
* [Ray Boord](/wiki/Ray_Boord "Ray Boord") (1954–1960)
* [Steve Chadwick](/wiki/Steve_Chadwick "Steve Chadwick") (1999–2011)
